servers.name: newsletter-commerce-intelligence
servers.description: Extract affiliate products, sponsor sections, and brand recommendations from newsletter issues (Substack, Ghost, Beehiiv, plain text). Returns structured product data with confidence scores, recommendation strength, and affiliate links.

tools.name: extract_newsletter_products
tools.description: Extract affiliate products, sponsored brands, and product recommendations from a newsletter issue.

tools.name: analyze_newsletter_sponsors
tools.description: Identify sponsor sections and estimate CPM, read-through rate, and sponsor fit score.

tools.name: track_product_trends
tools.description: Compare product mentions across multiple newsletter issues to detect rising and falling trends.
